title: Mexican Chicken Fajitas
description: Savor the flavors of Mexico with this spicy and flavorful dish. Marinated chicken cooked with bell peppers and onions, served with warm flour tortillas.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5-6 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the sliced onion and bell peppers to the skillet and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the fajita seasoning to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir to combine with the vegetables and seasoning.
Warm the flour tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the fajitas by placing a portion of the chicken and vegetable mixture onto a tortilla and topping with sour cream and shredded cheese, if desired.
